untranslatable_reason: Signal requires swing-by-swing analysis: tracking successive upswing price ranges, comparing consecutive upswing durations, and measuring downswing magnitudes relative to prior upswings. This requires swing detection (identifying local highs/lows) and multi-bar comparison logic not expressible with point-in-time indicator values. Thresholds for downswing excess are also undefined [THRESHOLD_NEEDED]. ATR and ADX used as proxies for trend weakness detection, but cannot capture the specific swing pattern logic.
translation_notes: The original signal is a swing-structure pattern recognition rule that cannot be directly translated to bar-by-bar technical indicators. The core logic requires: (1) swing detection and labeling, (2) measurement of swing ranges across multiple prior swings, (3) duration comparison across bars. Used ADX > 25 as a proxy for established trend, and SMA crossover as a surrogate exit condition for trend failure. A proper implementation would require custom swing-tracking logic external to standard indicator evaluation.
